segments.text: Hmm, looks like that confirmed off the hitstun from hitting Pikmin
segments.original_text: うーんピクミンを殴ったヒットストップで確定したっぽかったですね

segments.text: That's just a Pikmin & Olimar matchup thing, you need to be them to pull it off
segments.original_text: あの辺はピクミン&オリマー側ではないとできないゲームですね

segments.text: Up smash twice
segments.original_text: 上スマ2回

segments.text: Parry!
segments.original_text: ジャストシールド

segments.text: The bair doesn't connect, though
segments.original_text: 空後は届きませんが

segments.text: From the whiff punish bair into...
segments.original_text: 差し返しとした空後から

segments.text: This percent is looking even
segments.original_text: パーセントこれで5分

segments.text: Yeah, by spacing back with the aerial and forcing a shield...
segments.original_text: いやー空中後ろを引きながらガードさせることによって

segments.text: Got through the landing super clean
segments.original_text: うまく着地通していきました

segments.text: Both players just fishing with moves that won't confirm
segments.original_text: 確定できない技振りをお互いにという状況

segments.text: If this lands for Shuuton, it really opens up his offense!
segments.original_text: いやーこれが通すとシュートン側がかなり攻めやすくなるぞ

segments.text: Nice up DI!
segments.original_text: 上シフトお見事

segments.text: Want to get out from under that bair pressure, but...
segments.original_text: 空後で圧をかける紫は一旦剥がしたいところですが

segments.text: The bair is starting to stale by now, though...
segments.original_text: そろそろ空中後ろにもOPがかかってきたので

segments.text: From center stage it's gonna be tough to land the KO
segments.original_text: 中央からだったら撃墜はしにくいのかなと感じます

segments.text: Alright, here we go...
segments.original_text: さあ出あれば

segments.text: Moving in now
segments.original_text: 駆け始めます

segments.text: Wants to start building offense from here, pressuring the opponent...
segments.original_text: 相手を追い込むところから試合を始めていきたいような状況ですが

segments.text: Both players have great neutral positioning at center
segments.original_text: 中央の陣取りがお互いにうまい

segments.text: Applying pressure with bair and uair, and throw combos are starting to show up
segments.original_text: 空後と空上のプレッシャーをかけつつ投げ場が見えている

segments.text: Myou Senshi's purple Pikmin...
segments.original_text: 妙戦士紫ピクミンの

full_text: Hmm, looks like that confirmed off the hitstun from hitting Pikmin. That's just a Pikmin & Olimar matchup thing, you need to be them to pull it off. Up smash twice. Parry! The bair doesn't connect, though. From the whiff punish bair into... This percent is looking even. Yeah, by spacing back with the aerial and forcing a shield... Got through the landing super clean. Both players just fishing with moves that won't confirm. If this lands for Shuuton, it really opens up his offense! Nice up DI! Want to get out from under that bair pressure, but... The bair is starting to stale by now, though... From center stage it's gonna be tough to land the KO. Alright, here we go... Moving in now. Wants to start building offense from here, pressuring the opponent... Both players have great neutral positioning at center. Applying pressure with bair and uair, and throw combos are starting to show up. Myou Senshi's purple Pikmin...

corrections.original: ピクミン&オリマスカーではないとできないゲートですね
corrections.corrected: ピクミン&オリマー側ではないとできないゲームですね
corrections.rule: Character name: オリマスカー→オリマー側; homophone: ゲート→ゲーム

corrections.original: 差し返しとした今日から
corrections.corrected: 差し返しとした空後から
corrections.rule: Move: 今日→空後(homophone きょう/くうご)
